owned_files.notes: Multi-hop signed-object gossip + federation connection management (Phase 3 PR 1+2). Implements forward_to_federation, start_federation_connections, federation_connect_loop, gossip_signed_object, gossip_profile, broadcast_federation_status. Two TODOs: verify Ed25519 signature for profiles (line 220), client-signed profiles (line 461). Rate limiting: 10 msgs/sec chat, 50 objects/sec per peer.

Per-observer per-issuer trust scoring (Phase 3 PR 2). Implements issuer_trust_good/bad with delta clamping (MAX_DELTA=0.05), index_dispute with self-dispute guard. Tests: unknown_issuer_has_neutral_trust, good_event_raises_trust, bad_event_drops_trust, delta_caps_at_max, trust_clamped_to_unit_interval, dispute_object_lowers_target_trust, self_dispute_is_noop. Trust range [0,1], symmetric neutral=0.5.

todos_found: src/relay/handlers/federation.rs:220 - TODO: verify Ed25519 signature once clients sign profiles
gaps: Profile signing: gossip_profile and received ProfileGossip messages lack Ed25519 signature verification (deferred pending client-side implementation)
summary: Federation scope nearly complete: gossip + trust scoring fully functional. Two profile-signing TODOs are deferred pending client-side support; completion_check satisfied for current Phase 3 PR.
